violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Observed wiping cloth on food prep surface rather than in bucket of sanitizing solution.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Observed handle of serving spoon in food in walk in cooler.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food in microwave by hot hold unit.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — ---Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Observed handle of spoons in raw beef and in raw chicken.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable or dispensed effectively for self-service operations of ready-to-eat foods. -Observed bowel with no handle used as scoop in dry bulk product. -Observed drinking glass with no handle used as scoop in dry bulk product.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed duct tape holding plastic sheeting on walk in freezer. Duct tape is not a cleanable material.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed that doors and sides of appliances were sticky and, or greasy and need to be cleaned.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Observed sanitizer in bucket was 0ppm tested with both Quat and Chl. test strips.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — ---Observed surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors in dish area and food prep area were very slippery.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
